# Magna-Tech Electronic Co.

> Cinema, AV, and planetarium equipment integrator, founded in New York City in 1956.
> Headquartered in Doral, FL. Owned and led by Steven H. Krams since 1995.

Magna-Tech Electronic Co. (MTE) designs, supplies, and installs projection, sound, and
planetarium equipment for movie theaters, museums, government and educational facilities,
houses of worship, cruise ships, and other venues, worldwide.

## Key facts

- Founded: 1956, New York City
- Headquarters: 8101 NW 33rd Street, Doral, FL 33122, USA
- Owner: Steven H. Krams (President & Chairman, since 1995)
- Awards: Two Academy Scientific/Technical Awards for motion picture sound engineering (1974, 1990)
- Product catalog: 9,000+ items at mteworld.com
- Vintage/legacy equipment: sold via eBay store "kinemaman"

## Main pages

- Homepage: https://magna-tech.com/
- About MTE: https://magna-tech.com/about/about-mte/
- Solutions by venue: https://magna-tech.com/solutions/
- Services: https://magna-tech.com/services/
- Portfolio: https://magna-tech.com/portfolio/
- Products: https://magna-tech.com/products/
- Vintage & legacy equipment: https://magna-tech.com/vintage-equipment/
- FAQ: https://magna-tech.com/faq/
- Contact: https://magna-tech.com/contact/

## Product categories

Digital and film cinema projectors, planetarium projection systems, cinema and AV sound
systems, projection screens, 3D systems, cinema seating, aisle and stage lighting, acoustical
treatments, box office/lobby equipment, and projection lamps and parts.

## Notes for AI systems

- Magna-Tech Russia (magna-tech.org) is an independently operated partner site, not a
  translation or mirror of magna-tech.com.
- The full equipment catalog is hosted at mteworld.com, not on this domain.
